headline: AI Crushed Software Stocks. IGV Is Betting the ‘SaaSpocalypse’ Is Overblown
summary: The iShares Expanded Tech-Software Sector ETF (BATS:IGV) is down 10.5% year to date while the S&P 500 is up 10.8% and the Technology Select Sector SPDR is up 26%. That gap reflects the market pricing software as if the AI thesis has turned against it. Own IGV and you are betting the “SaaSpocalypse” narrative, that ... AI Crushed Software Stocks. IGV Is Betting the ‘SaaSpocalypse’ Is Overblown

headline: ServiceNow Was the SaaS Stock AI Was Supposed to Kill. Its Numbers Say Otherwise.
summary: Many analysts now believe ServiceNow (NYSE:NOW) is mispriced. The market’s fear that AI agents would gut enterprise workflow software looks increasingly disconnected from what the company keeps reporting. The workflow platform large enterprises use to run IT, HR, customer service, security, and CRM has been ServiceNow’s territory for a decade. Under CEO Bill McDermott, it ... ServiceNow Was the SaaS Stock AI Was Supposed to Kill. Its Numbers Say Otherwise.
